description: Gate v2 ground truth — superforecasters essay (loop rounds 1+2, same text). Distilled 2026-07-11 from TRIPLE-confirmed rows: grader ruling + Fable independent ruling (round-1 grader was Fable natively; round-2 gaps filled by the 2026-07-11 Fable pass, data/gate_v2/fable_r2.json) + owner review. Rows where any signal disagrees are watch, never hard. Scorer: benchmarks/coverage_check.py. Gate runs a FRESH verify of data/loop_rounds/round_1/project into a scratch dir. Excluded from gate v2 entirely (owner, 2026-07-11): the eggs text and the round-5 violence text — their content trips Fable's safety layer, so no Fable column is possible.
